title: Google BigQuery Table
description: Schema representing a BigQuery table resource, including its structure, metadata, and configuration.

id.description: The fully-qualified unique name of the table in the format projectId:datasetId.tableId

tableReference.description: Reference describing the ID of this table

friendlyName.description: A descriptive name for this table

description.description: A user-friendly description of this table

schema.description: Describes the schema of this table

numRows.description: The number of rows of data in this table

numBytes.description: The size of this table in bytes, excluding any data in the streaming buffer

location.description: The geographic location where the table resides

labels.description: The labels associated with this table

creationTime.description: The time when this table was created, in milliseconds since the epoch

expirationTime.description: The time when this table expires, in milliseconds since the epoch

lastModifiedTime.description: The time when this table was last modified, in milliseconds since the epoch

TableReference.description: A reference uniquely identifying a BigQuery table

projectId.description: The ID of the project containing this table

datasetId.description: The ID of the dataset containing this table

fields.description: Describes the fields in a table

TableFieldSchema.description: A field in a BigQuery table schema

name.description: The field name, must be unique within the table schema

fields.description: Describes the nested schema fields if the type is RECORD

policyTags.description: Policy tags attached to this field for column-level security

names.description: A list of policy tag resource names
